findings.condition: Full unittest discover had not been re-run after the safe smoke patch.
findings.impact: MVP-4 state could look stronger than the locally reproducible package evidence.
findings.fix: Ran full unittest discovery and recorded 502/502 PASS.

findings.condition: tools/run_safe_smoke.py used a local atomic writer instead of the shared evidence writer.
findings.impact: Evidence writer coverage regression test treated it as a new direct/local writer path.
findings.fix: Converted run_safe_smoke output writing to the shared atomic write_json helper.

findings.condition: Three patch_result files used descriptive coverage_index_result values outside the test-enforced closed status set.
findings.impact: Patch history failed non-live invariant tests despite schema parse success.
findings.fix: Normalized coverage_index_result to PASS and recomputed result hashes plus ledger/state references.

findings.condition: __pycache__ and .pyc files exist in the working tree after test execution.
findings.impact: Release/source bundle could be misleading if hygiene logic accidentally included runtime/cache files.
findings.fix: Rebuilt source bundle manifest: 546 included, 1089 excluded, forbidden_count=0, contains_secret=false.
